ha_note: Production Cloudflare tunnel/edge is anchored on durable runtime backend for 24/7 uptime. The free local-model pool now supports selectable local runtimes: Ollama, llama.cpp, and LM Studio/llmster. The public catalog reports only healthy/listed runtime models and hides raw LAN endpoints.

live_runtime_services.description: Automated website audit for agents evaluating local-business opportunities. Intro price lowered for settlement testing.

One-cent payment/transaction smoke-test endpoint for AI agents to prove they can complete a DDG paid request and receive a machine-readable receipt. No external side effect beyond payment verification/settlement.

Live OpenAI-compatible paid model-router completion endpoint for AI agents. Supports basic conversation, analysis, code/help prompts, DDG routing extensions, payment gating, budget caps, and receipts without provider-key exposure.

Live bounded agent-task endpoint. Agents can select local runtime routes across Ollama, llama.cpp, and LM Studio/llmster when the requested model is listed healthy for that runtime. Provider-backed Kimi K2.7 Code/Claude artifact routes remain paid/env-gated/manual-approved and never expose raw credentials/tokens/seats.
live_runtime_services.seat_policy: one concurrent free local generation seat per healthy local runtime endpoint (Ollama, llama.cpp, or LM Studio/llmster); default cap 2 for a two configured 8GB-VRAM runtime backends; 24-hour per-agent lease, 100 requests/lease, 60s swarm generation timeout, 120s agent-run timeout; reusable after lease expiry

live_runtime_services.description: Paid order-intake endpoint for all manual/beta DDG agent offerings. Records a redacted order queue item after payment and requires operator review before fulfillment or any irreversible action.
Live free/best-effort local model swarm preview with strict lease/request caps and selectable local runtime for listed models: Ollama, llama.cpp, or LM Studio/llmster.
live_runtime_services.seat_policy: one concurrent free local generation seat per healthy local runtime endpoint (Ollama, llama.cpp, or LM Studio/llmster); default cap 2 for a two configured 8GB-VRAM runtime backends; 24-hour per-agent lease, 100 requests/lease, 60s swarm generation timeout, 120s agent-run timeout; reusable after lease expiry

live_runtime_services.description: Lists healthy/listed local runtime models for Ollama, llama.cpp, and LM Studio/llmster plus local runtime policy. Public requests never trigger downloads or expose raw backend URLs.
live_runtime_services.seat_policy: one concurrent free local generation seat per healthy local runtime endpoint (Ollama, llama.cpp, or LM Studio/llmster); default cap 2 for a two configured 8GB-VRAM runtime backends; 24-hour per-agent lease, 100 requests/lease, 60s swarm generation timeout, 120s agent-run timeout; reusable after lease expiry

live_runtime_services.description: AI agents can request a new local model/runtime (Ollama, llama.cpp GGUF, LM Studio/llmster, OpenAI-compatible local server, or vLLM). Requests queue for operator disk/safety/license/binding review; public requests never auto-download.
Free static AI skill safety scanner for prompt-injection, secret-exfiltration, dangerous tool-use, install-script, and broad file/network access red flags. Raw secret-like values are redacted.

manual_operator_review_services.description: Operator-reviewed DDG-operated model/artifact run using available backend tools where terms permit, including Kimi K2.7 Code within Kimi Code. Buyers receive bounded results/artifacts, never provider credentials, account seats, or raw provider access. Can be used for basic conversation, code/research drafts, repo analysis, or other bounded agent tasks.
Human-reviewed audit with stronger client-facing recommendations.
Small curated local-business lead pack with evidence URLs and outreach angles.
Browser-based proof/QA capture with screenshots and reproducible steps.
Personalized outreach brief/draft. Does not send messages without human approval.
Create or repair llms.txt, OpenAPI, pricing/catalog JSON, and agent-readable service docs.
Audit an MCP server or tool surface for installability, schema quality, auth, and prompt-injection risk.
Probe an agent-facing website/API/MCP/tool for prompt injection, data exfiltration, unsafe tool-use, and mitigation notes.
Turn a repo/docs/SOP corpus into an agent-ready context pack, skill, workflow, or implementation guide.
Repair OpenAPI/MCP/tool schemas so agents can reliably call them, with examples and validation.
Paid source-linked research brief with citations, confidence notes, and launch recommendation.
Compare a current/proposed page and return conversion, trust, copy, and agent-readability improvements.
Create a private lead-specific prototype/demo concept for a local business, with evidence and staged offer angle.
Audit an API/service for x402/MPP/402 paid-agent readiness, idempotency, receipts, and discovery assets.
Build a Hermes skill, generic agent skill, or reusable workflow for the buyer's existing AI/agent stack.
Use DDG-operated models to convert a procedure into a skill/workflow usable by Claude, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, Hermes, or another agent.
Design and scaffold an MCP tool/server from a plain-English goal, including schema, install docs, and smoke tests.

Prompt-injection and tool-exfiltration scan. Security services designed for AI-agent builders, MCP/tool authors, and swarm operators. Paid intake is machine-readable; most scans are operator-reviewed until automated scanners are fully sandboxed.

npm/package-lock dependency risk scan. Security services designed for AI-agent builders, MCP/tool authors, and swarm operators. Paid intake is machine-readable; most scans are operator-reviewed until automated scanners are fully sandboxed.

Python dependency and import-risk scan. Security services designed for AI-agent builders, MCP/tool authors, and swarm operators. Paid intake is machine-readable; most scans are operator-reviewed until automated scanners are fully sandboxed.

API-key/secret leak and credential boundary scan. Security services designed for AI-agent builders, MCP/tool authors, and swarm operators. Paid intake is machine-readable; most scans are operator-reviewed until automated scanners are fully sandboxed.

Malware/suspicious-code triage for agent workflows. Security services designed for AI-agent builders, MCP/tool authors, and swarm operators. Paid intake is machine-readable; most scans are operator-reviewed until automated scanners are fully sandboxed.

MCP/tool permission and auth-boundary audit. Security services designed for AI-agent builders, MCP/tool authors, and swarm operators. Paid intake is machine-readable; most scans are operator-reviewed until automated scanners are fully sandboxed.

Agent swarm supply-chain baseline bundle. Security services designed for AI-agent builders, MCP/tool authors, and swarm operators. Paid intake is machine-readable; most scans are operator-reviewed until automated scanners are fully sandboxed.

Productionized public-surface security audit for AI-agent services, MCP/tool servers, OpenAPI/llms.txt catalogs, dependency manifests, prompt-injection exposure, public endpoints, and payment/check-out safety. Ordered by AI agents through /v1/order-intake; operator-reviewed before fulfillment.

Agent checkout conformance audit for machine-payable services: validates 403->402->200->receipt flow, protocol advertisement, spend caps, idempotency replay, fake-token fail-closed behavior, and receipt/artifact semantics.

MPP/payment-rail onboarding package for AI-agent sellers: verifies provider/currency configuration, sidecar health, 402 protocol ordering, penny smoke path, replay protection, fake-proof rejection, and go-live checklist.
Buyer-facing artifact and receipt console pack for paid agent services: order table, receipt view, budget/rail metadata, artifact status, audit trail, download links, and agent-readable status JSON.
Bundled launch package for AI-agent buyers and sellers: security_preflight, checkout_conformance, agent_readability_upgrade, mcp_tool_audit, and local_model_runtime_setup scoped into one paid order.

Create/polish an AI-agent service distribution packet: /.well-known/ai, API linkset, agent-skills index, agents.json, llms.txt/OpenAPI/catalog alignment, sitemap/robots, and registry/marketplace listing copy for MCP/x402/agent directories.

Prepare agent-marketplace submissions and PR/issue copy for x402 directories, MCP registries, agent-ready scanners, GitHub README/listing pages, and search-indexable service docs. No spam or unauthorized posting; operator approval required before external submission.

Score a domain/API for agent readiness: discovery endpoints, OpenAPI, llms.txt, agent-skill index, API catalog linkset, payment 402 behavior, auth docs, MCP status, sitemap/robots, and machine-readable commerce signals.

Run a DDG buyer-agent simulation against a target service: discover capabilities, verify 403/402/payment challenge behavior, fake-payment fail-closed, idempotency, and artifact/status usability. Spending tests require explicit operator-approved credentials/budget.

planned_or_hidden_services.description: Run a bounded CLI-agent/model task in a sandbox and return the artifact/report, never provider credentials. Current Kimi Code route is published as kimi-code/k2.7 / Kimi K2.7 Code.

Planned paid/beta lease for a local Ollama/vLLM-backed mini-model swarm seat on the durable runtime backend. Requires NVIDIA driver fix, model downloads, and benchmarked concurrency before public self-serve.

Free launch-beta read-only Ethereum full-node query endpoint. Implemented behind a method whitelist, sync readiness gate, fair-use lease timer, per-agent request caps, and upstream max-concurrency cap; not advertised public-ready until Reth execution sync completes.

free_policy.sync_gate: DDG_ETH_RPC_REQUIRE_SYNCED defaults true; returns 503 reth_rpc_syncing until eth_syncing=false and latest block is non-zero
free_policy.safety: read-only method whitelist; blocks eth_sendRawTransaction/admin/debug/personal; raw Reth RPC must stay private behind DDG edge

privacy_note: Ethereum/Reth private RPC is planned as DDG-hosted read-only node access so buyer agents do not need a third-party RPC account; DDG edge identity/payment gates still apply.

local_model_upstream_candidates.status: staging; not default-routed until downloaded and smoke-tested on durable runtime backend/overflow runtime backend
local_model_upstream_candidates.selection_rule: mradermacher GGUF models <=12B params; prefer Q4_K_M unless unavailable; expose upstream repo and selected GGUF file to agent clients

local_model_free_policy.future_free_tier: After the limited-time promo, only models 4B and smaller remain free.
local_model_free_policy.larger_models_after_promo: Models over 4B become paid or operator-approved local capacity after the promo.
local_model_free_policy.seat_policy: one concurrent free local generation seat per healthy configured Ollama/GPU backend; default cap 2 for a two configured 8GB-VRAM runtime backends; 24-hour per-agent lease, 100 requests/lease, 60s swarm generation timeout, 120s agent-run timeout; reusable after lease expiry
local_model_free_policy.two_seat_condition: durable runtime backend and overflow runtime backend must both be online, configured in the internal backend pool, healthy on /api/tags, and raw Ollama must remain LAN/loopback behind the payment edge.
local_model_free_policy.reuse_policy: same stable agent identity can use the seat again after the 24-hour lease expires

two_host_production_target.primary-host: 8GB-VRAM GPU, production GPU seat when online
two_host_production_target.condition: both hosts must be configured in the internal backend pool and pass /api/tags health checks; raw Ollama URLs remain private behind payment edge

local_model_free_policy.runtime_selection: Agents can request `runtime=ollama`, `runtime=llama.cpp`, or `runtime=lm_studio`, or use route prefixes `ollama/`, `llama.cpp/`, `lm_studio/` under /v1/model/agent-run.

local_model_download_policy.preferred_large_model_host: durable runtime backend first; keep overflow runtime backend storage for Reth sync, OS, and operator workspace.
local_model_download_policy.operator_review: Requests queue only. Operator checks license/safety/disk, downloads manually, smokes, then marks READY.

local_runtime_options.notes: GGUF-native llama.cpp server option via OpenAI-compatible /v1/models and /v1/chat/completions behind the DDG edge.
LM Studio/llmster local server option via OpenAI-compatible /v1/models and /v1/chat/completions behind the DDG edge.
Generic adapter for future local runtimes after auth, binding, timeout, and exact-model smoke tests.
Requestable for suitable hardware; not advertised as live until exact-model smoke passes.

free_local_model_agent_slots.claim: Connect these to your AI agent via DDG free local-model slots.
free_local_model_agent_slots.future_free_policy: After the promo, <=4B local models remain free; >4B local routes become paid/operator-approved capacity.

supported_local_runtimes.notes: Production free-slot runtime; dynamic downloaded-model catalog.
GGUF-native runtime target for the same model files; expose exact repo/file identity.
LM Studio requires desktop/local server support; keep as operator-request until a headless-compatible service is verified.
Any local runtime exposing OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions can be added behind the same payment/free-slot edge.

free_local_model_agent_slots.context_disclosure: Catalog lists native GGUF context and DDG service default context separately. Native context is model metadata; DDG free slots default to 32K tokens for large GGUF aliases unless a route states otherwise.

anchor_models.notes: abliterated Qwen3 8B route on durable runtime backend
Dolphin3 abliterated durable runtime backend route
long-context small Mistral route on durable runtime backend

priority_ab_rollout_models.notes: GLM-family abliterated route; IQ3 chosen for 8GB-class hosts.

model_router.claude_code_agent_run: /v1/model/agent-run route claude-code/default, payment-gated DDG-operated artifact run

queryable_model_routes.public_statement: Kimi K2.7 Code is available as a DDG-operated paid artifact/result route and can be used within Kimi Code.
queryable_model_routes.credential_policy: DDG returns bounded outputs/artifacts only; no provider credentials, account seats, or raw sessions are transferred.

ethereum_rpc_free_policy.sync_gate: DDG_ETH_RPC_REQUIRE_SYNCED defaults true; returns 503 reth_rpc_syncing until eth_syncing=false and latest block is non-zero
ethereum_rpc_free_policy.safety: read-only method whitelist; blocks eth_sendRawTransaction/admin/debug/personal; raw Reth RPC must stay private behind DDG edge

artifact_receipt_console.identity_scope: same stable agent identity hash used at order intake

checkout_conformance.spending_default: non-spending unless a real credential or dev mock token is supplied

required_live_values: seller-side Tempo/MPP signing credential installed in secret manager
MPP verifier shared/provider secret installed in secret manager
Stripe machine-payments/SPT profile id if card/SPT path is used
mpp_activation.secret_handling: Private values are not published in public catalog; install directly on production host/secret manager.

x402.settlement_default: Base mainnet USDC for production/x402scan compatibility
x402.amount_unit: atomic integer strings; USDC has 6 decimals, so $0.01 is "10000"

public_address_families.description: ETH/EVM native assets plus operator-confirmed EVM stablecoins (USDC, USDT, DAI, PYUSD, FRAX, FDUSD, GUSD, LUSD, USDP, TUSD, EURC) on supported EVM networks; auto verifier currently supports configured EVM native/USDC paths.
Solana mainnet; SOL and SPL stablecoin proof can be operator-confirmed.
Tron mainnet; TRX and TRC20 stablecoin proof can be operator-confirmed.
XRP Ledger mainnet; destination-tag policy should be checked before high-volume payments.
Stellar mainnet; XLM and Stellar-issued stablecoin proof can be operator-confirmed.
Algorand mainnet; ALGO and ASA stablecoin proof can be operator-confirmed.
Polkadot mainnet; manual/operator confirmation unless a Substrate indexer is configured.
Zcash transparent t-address; shielded payments are not auto-confirmed.
Monero primary address; public balance is not visible and auto confirmation requires view-only wallet RPC, otherwise operator confirmation.

auto_verification_scope: BTC, BCH, LTC, DOGE, transparent ZEC via public-chain lookups
EVM native transfers and USDC on configured Ethereum/Base/Polygon RPC paths
SOL, TRX, XRP, XLM, and ALGO native payment lookups
XMR only when a view-only monero-wallet-rpc is configured
manual_confirmation_scope: DOT until a Substrate/Subscan indexer is configured
XMR without wallet RPC, shielded ZEC, non-USDC stablecoins, and any supported address family the verifier cannot conclusively confirm

mpp.advertise_rule: Do not add MPP to public 402 challenges, OpenAPI live protocols, or listing copy until ready:true, real penny settlement, idempotent replay, fake-token 402, and leak scan pass.
